violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -No documentation available of current certified food service manager.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Did not observe any date marking, specifically noted at egg mix, shredded pork and Deli Express items.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Walk in freezer (glass side) door fell of hinges, awaiting repairs.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Frost build up at shelves near glass doors of freezer. -Crumb/debris at racks in backroom walk in freezer.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Steady leak at 3 comp sink faucet. Hot water is turned on and off at valve below sinks to stop drip. -No hot water available at hand sinks of public restrooms.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. -Women's restroom door open at time of inspection, does NOT self-close.
Person in charge. — --Could not verify up to date Certified food service manager certificate.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — ---No sani bucket made up at time of inspection *Should be ready to use during food preparation and service.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Deli express items are not date marked.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Egg mix in make table and in walk in cooler is not date marked.
Contaminated food disposition. — ---Hot hold items are held up to 2 hours, however, time stamps are not placed on packages.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. -The 1st sink is being used with soap and chlorine. *Ensure Wash, Rinse, Sanitize and Air dry for all dishes

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Steady leak at 3 comp sink faucet. Hot water is turned on and off at valve below sinks to stop drip. -No hot water available at hand sinks of public restrooms.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. -Out of hand soap in dispenser. *COS-staff stocked an individual pump hand soap.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Paper towel dispenser out. *COS -roll of loose paper towels placed at shelf next to hand sink.
Installed, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
